美國已經批准審核香港人權及民主法案2019，國會議員可以制定制裁名單。
請各位軍師善用呢個機會，依家大家應搜集一切過往新聞片段、照片、新聞報導、政府新聞公告等一切資料，羅列所有協助侵犯香港人權嘅個人、企業嘅罪證，整理好一份名單，寄俾美國嘅國會議員。
只要佢哋落入《全球馬格尼茨基人權問責法案》嘅制裁名單，咁個人或公司經濟即刻受到重創。咁呢班商人到時就會調轉槍頭，向政府施壓要求政府讓步及妥協。
我在此拋磚引玉，請大家接力發掘：
香港警察：非法鎮壓、濫捕和平示威者，無顯示警員編號及無出示委任證，應全體受到制裁。所以請大家依家要整理好現役警員清單。
律政司：無理監控
政府新聞處：惡意抹黑示威者，為港共政權掩飾罪證。
黨鐵：多次協助警察鎮壓示威者，721車務控制中心落order迫停列車，任由黑幫恐怖襲擊。
新雄雞：縱容警察在其屬下商場毆打、濫捕示威者
狗巴、八達通：將示威者八達通資料交與警察抓捕
中國國務院港澳辦、中國外交部、中聯辦、人民日報、中央電視台、環球時報、太公文匯報、賣過百份報、黨媒01、巫線、腥賭日報：惡意抹黑示威者，散播仇恨言論，為港共政權掩飾罪證。
富臨：主動為參與鎮壓和平示威者嘅黑幫提供膳食。
國家民航局、國泰、拮野家：打壓參與示威嘅員工、或以政治原因炒員工
中國政法委：打壓及恐嚇李嘉誠同情年輕人的言論
等等。

我地要做嘅係，向美國參眾議員建議制裁名單及佢地罪證。一旦制裁名單上嘅人士、企業受到美國制裁，以後就無人及公司可以同佢做生意。否則同受制裁。例子如下：

中國企業違反伊朗制裁令　美國務卿：將進行懲罰
美國國務卿龐皮歐（Mike Pompeo）周三（9/25）表示，部分中國公司及個人因違反伊朗制裁禁令，而正接受美國的相關制裁。
 
美國之音報導，美國財政部周三在其官網上公佈了這次最新制裁的對象，包括5名中國公民和6家中國實體。龐皮歐在紐約聯大會議期間參加一次會議時說：「正如我們對中國和所有國家所說的那樣：要知道我們將對每一次違反禁令進行制裁。」
 
龐皮歐還說，華府正努力讓各國了解跟伊朗革命衛隊做生意的風險，美國將懲罰那些違反制裁並且繼續跟伊朗接觸的實體和個人。
 
據悉，這6家被制裁的中國實體是中遠海運（大連）有限公司、大連中遠海運油運船員船舶管理有限公司、中和石油有限公司、昆侖航運有限公司，昆侖控股有限公司和飛馬88有限公司。

Since the end of August, I’ve started to assist in
sorting out info on San Uk Ling Inhuman Tortures.

From this, I at least discovered two cases of rape
conducted by HK Police and border officers.

Therefore, I’m sure that physical and sexual violence are involved in San Uk Ling.

Victims include youngsters, male and female.

Violence include gang rape, rape, sodomy…

Teasing victims’ genitals with baton, groping victims’ breast…

Abusing victims till their heads bleed, bones fracture and
suffer from cerebral haemorrhage etc.


Don’t ask me why I’m so sure.

I could only tell you what I can.

You are all enraged and curious,

You want to factcheck the details on the inhumane tortures in San Uk Ling,

But these are all useless.

First, the police insist there are no CCTV in San Uk Ling.

Second, they will not disclose any video records even if CCTVs exist.

Third, till now, none of the victims made any accusations on the police.

Even if one is willing to stand forward,

It is impossible for us to understand their mental and physical sufferings.

Would you be heartless enough to see them suffer once more?

Therefore, I sincerely ask you to give more time and space for the victims.

If you observe carefully, you can also find clues from reported and upcoming news.


Seeing the police make political prosecutions against protestors,

Brutally beating up protestors
till their heads bleed and bones fracture.

I could still reluctantly treat them as execution and emotional ventilation.

But knowing the fact that they did rape young girls,
and tried to destroy the future of the next generation.

I could never apprehend their acts with humanity.

I could never believe such depravity of man.

If you are one of the 30,000 police,

you might have heard that since the end of August,

were at least 9 cases of police being beaten up by unknown persons.

As the seniors imposed blackouts on the news,

this is still not widely reported by news media.

No matter how frightened you are,
and how you want to resign now,

It is already too late.

Hongkongers will fight till the end.

Our unity will overcome all evils and take revenge for all.

Recently, I have started to hate myself,

As when I found out more and more stories and incidents,

I find myself slowly being insensitive towards all these nonsenses.

It is true that we could become insensitive even when facing such tragedy.

There is no turning back for Hong Kong,
same for the corrupt cops.

Without a choice, we have already paid a heavy price.

In return, the corrupt cops will also need to pay the highest price for their deeds.

I would like to remind myself now,
that we all keep the fire of anger burning.

No matter in present or in future discussions,

I ask you all to take revenge for all the tragedies in San Uk Ling.
